productName: SF FIR JF - 1G - Blu Voodoo - Dessert - HYB - CR
description: This hybrid disposable carries Blu Voodoo in a ready-to-go pen with the battery built right in — grab it, hit it, recycle it when it's done. Zero setup, all flavor — a balanced, sweet-earthy profile, with a smooth, well-rounded vibe.
